overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a sunlit meadow and forest during golden hour. The journey progresses from open grassland with distant mountains to rocky terrain and finally into a denser wooded area with wooden fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit meadow path with mountain vista

events.description: camera passes under low-hanging tree branches temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the meadow with sword on back, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: snow-capped mountains visible in the distance against the golden sky
winding dirt trail through the grassland
oak and birch trees scattered across the meadow
tall green grass with wildflowers lining the path
clusters of red poppies growing along the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, sunlit meadow during golden hour. Geralt walks along a winding dirt path surrounded by tall grass and scattered deciduous trees. Red poppies dot the landscape, and a majestic mountain range is visible in the distant center. The camera briefly passes under overhanging branches around the 12-second mark, creating a momentary occlusion.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with golden light on stone

events.description: terrain shifts from open meadow to rocky hillside with large limestone boulders appearing on the right
sunlight creates dramatic long shadows as the path curves around rock formations

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path as it curves around limestone outcrops and rock formations

entered.detail: large weathered boulders and rocky outcrops lining the right side of the path
thick bushes and shrubs growing between the rocks

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a rockier landscape as the path winds through limestone formations. Large boulders dominate the right side while dense undergrowth fills the spaces between rocks. The distant mountains and open meadow fade from view as the terrain becomes more enclosed. The golden hour light casts long shadows across the trail, and the trees shift to primarily frame the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest corridor with wooden fencing

events.description: path enters denser forest with wooden split-rail fences appearing on the right side
purple lavender flowers become prominent along the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded forest corridor, passing wooden fences and patches of wildflowers

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts and rails lining the right side of the forest path
clusters of purple lavender growing along the left edge of the trail
thick overhead tree canopy filtering the golden sunlight

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a densely forested area where the path becomes more enclosed. Wooden split-rail fences appear on the right, guiding the trail through the trees. The lighting shifts to dappled sunlight filtering through the dense canopy overhead. Purple lavender flowers line the left side of the path, replacing the earlier red poppies. The rocky terrain gives way to a more traditional forest floor as Geralt continues his journey deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit meadow that gradually narrows into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through tall grass and red poppies, with a majestic mountain range visible in the distance before the camera briefly passes under overhanging branches. As the path winds forward, the open meadow fades and the terrain shifts into a rockier landscape dominated by limestone formations and large boulders that cast long shadows across the trail. The scene then transitions into a thick wooded area where the lighting becomes dappled sunlight filtering through a dense canopy and purple lavender replaces the poppies along the path. Finally, the rocky ground gives way to a traditional forest floor as wooden split-rail fences appear on the right, guiding the journey deeper into the woods.
